title: Interest rates types
description: Practice understanding of fixed, variable, adjustable and introductory interest rates.

assessment_items.question_content:
You have a car loan with a $5\%$ fixed interest rate. Recently, interest rates have been rising, and the average car loan interest rate is now $7\%$.

**What happens to your monthly car payment?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

You currently have a home loan with a fixed interest rate.

**When is the best time to have this type of loan?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: when interest rates are going up
when interest rates are going down

assessment_items.question_content:
When applying for a business loan, the credit union offers you different interest types. You want a stable rate, even if it's higher than the others. You are not a risk-taker. 

**Which rate type will be best for you?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Last year you took out a home loan with a $4\%$ variable interest rate. This year interest rates are lower, with the average variable home loan interest rate at $3\%$.

**How does this rate change affect your home loan?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The cost of the loan goes up.
The cost of the loan goes down.
The cost of the loan stays the same.

assessment_items.question_content:
Suppose you have a loan with a variable interest rate.

**When is it good to have this type this type of loan?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: when interest rates are going up
when interest rates are going down

assessment_items.question_content:
The credit union is offering personal loans with a variety of  different interest rate options. You are okay with risk and want the lowest rate with the possibility of benefiting if rates go down. 

**Which rate type best suits your needs?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Your business needed new equipment, so you got a loan with an $8\%$ adjustable interest rate. Since then, interest rates have come down, and the average business loan interest rate is now $6\%$.

**What will happen to your monthly loan payment with this rate change?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Your loan payment will go up.
Your loan payment will go down.
Your loan payment will stay the same.

assessment_items.question_content:
While shopping for a home loan, a lender offers you a mortgage with an adjustable interest rate.

**When would this type of loan be most beneficial?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: when interest rates are going up
when interest rates are going down

assessment_items.question_content:
When applying for a home loan, your bank offers different interest types. You want the lowest rate and to benefit if rates go down. You're okay with risk.

**Which interest type is best for you?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

A pre-owned dealer is offering a car loan with a $2\%$ introductory interest rate for $12$ months. The interest rate will adjust to $6\%$ after the introductory period expires. 

**After the introductory period expires, what will happen to your monthly car payment?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The payment will stay the same.

assessment_items.question_content:
A promotion comes in the mail that offers a credit card with an introductory interest rate.

**When would this offer benefit you the most?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: when you plan to pay it off during the low-rate period
when you can't afford an item on your other cards
when you struggle managing credit properly

assessment_items.question_content:
A store ad reads: 
*Special financing: No interest if paid in full within $18$ months*. 

**What type of interest rate does this ad describe?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
